retry_reason: If no matching device is found (returns NULL), the caller can retry later, as the device may be added to the bus asynchronously.
contract_summary: This is a get-wrapper for acquiring a reference on a device found by its device_node. It calls bus_find_device with the device_match_of_node predicate to locate the device and increment its reference count. The caller receives a pointer to the device with an additional reference; if no matching device exists, NULL is returned. Caller must put the device (e.g., via put_device()) when done. The caller should check for NULL and may retry if the device is expected to appear later.
